sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87709" key="prokata/rxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκατ-άρχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n87709.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">founder,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τελετῆς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg019:4:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Theol.Plat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.16</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
